name: david-cookbook
description: David's public cookbook: Claude Code plugin and shared patterns for building and shipping small apps.

plugins.name: david-toolkit
plugins.description: David's development toolkit: orc, a grill-first development orchestrator that drives feature work from idea through plan, build, verification, and handoff; and new-project, a paved-road app bootstrap that takes a name and an idea to a hosted app with staging/prod CI/CD.
